verdict: claude-sonnet-5, claude-opus-4-8 ACCEPTED a ~224738-token request (>200K) with NO context-1m beta header sent by gg-ai — a streamed completion came back, which a 400 context rejection cannot produce. The large payload was genuinely transmitted (counted as cacheWrite, since gg-ai applies cache_control to the last user turn). claude-fable-5 returned a 429 USAGE LIMIT — orthogonal to context size, so inconclusive here but not contradicting (owner-confirmed 1M GA). Conclusion: Anthropic 1M models are 1M-context GA on this route. The model-registry contextWindow of 1_000_000 is CORRECT and compaction at 0.85×1M is valid, so item #3 is a NO-OP — no route-aware clamp and no beta header are needed.
